improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your operations. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your Business & Trade Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="AI-powered answers for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant support, voice chat, and an unlimited workspace. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-gideon-preview.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by highlighting the core value proposition and the free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure the homepage displays a professional, branded preview when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B credibility. Including the three free searches call-to-action in both descriptions encourages immediate engagement without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace for your business operations. Try three searches free — no card required."
improvements.rationale: This copy immediately establishes what Gideon is (AI assistant for trade/business), highlights three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace), and removes friction by emphasizing the free trial with no payment barrier. The name 'Gideon' humanizes the product while 'Claude-powered' is implied through quality. Direct and benefit-driven to maximize conversions.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing Gideon. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace for all your trade and business needs.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel—what happens when the free trial ends. By clearly explaining the paywall transition and immediately highlighting the low entry price and annual savings, it reduces uncertainty and positions membership as accessible and valuable, encouraging sign-ups.
